titleStmt.title: SII 9.171: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 171. (A.R. No. 210 of 1913.) ON THE ROCKY FLOOR OF THE RAMALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT DAMMURU, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged. The preserved portion of the date is Chālukya-Vikrama year 31, Vyaya, Śrāvaṇa (Vyaya = A.D. 1106-07). The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mallarasa is said to have made a gift for the service of a god (name lost) of Dammara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlasthaṁbhāThe inscription is written in
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛtvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābha
raṇa śrīmatu tribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salutta(ṁ)mire kalyāṇapurada nelavīḍi
noḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta(ṁ)mire tatpādapadmōpajīvi
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ cōḷa
kaṭakakarituragapaṭusubhaṭanicayanicitabaḷavadaribaḷatimirakhaṇḍana
pratāpamārttaṇḍa nikararoḷgaṁḍa draviḷamaṁḍaḷikhasirakhaṁḍana maṁḍaḷikamukha
maṁḍananadaṭamaṁḍaḷikatārakāsurāri dasakandhamurāri mitramaṁḍaḷikakuḷārṇava
caṁdrabhōgāmarēṁdra satyavikhyāta maṁḍaḷikamāndhātanāhavanīla sēneyaṁkakāṟa
pallikōṭagharaṭṭa gūrjjaradiśāpaṭṭa śrīmatu tribhuvanamalladēvara
nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ mallara
kramavarṣada 30 neya vyayasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇada gra
grahaṇa mahāparvvadoḷu daṁmarada rāma
khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇōddhārakkaṁ
sarvanamasyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakammāḍi
koṭṭaru
Digital edition of SII 9.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
